div.p: Kikan owns platform-wide state. Each profile gets its own application DB. Backup snapshots both.

ul.li: Kikan owns meta.db (platform state) — every app on kikan gets the same shape.
Per-profile app DB filename comes from Graft::db_filename() (Mokumo returns "mokumo.db"). Another vertical on kikan picks its own filename without modifying kikan.
tower-sessions stays in its own ephemeral session.db so login/logout doesn't touch the platform or vertical DBs.
Backup scope = meta.db + active per-profile DB. Both written via VACUUM INTO (consistent snapshot, no WAL/SHM coordination needed).
PIN recovery dir is app-supplied via Graft::recovery_dir(profile_id); kikan watches & validates, app picks the location.
vertical migrations contributed by MokumoApp: Graft
